name: Risk Sentinel — Commodity Prices Ingestion (Customs Focus)

nodes.name: Schedule (Every 30min)
nodes.notes: Polls commodity prices every 30 minutes during trading hours

nodes.notes: Lists all customs-critical commodity symbols with HS codes and sensitivity weights

nodes.name: Yahoo Finance — Quote
nodes.notes: Fetches real-time price data from Yahoo Finance. Rate limit: stagger 200ms between requests.

nodes.notes: Parses Yahoo Finance response, calculates change/volatility, assigns alert levels
